flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 29% at University of Providence vs the 2018–2022 baseline (527 vs 739).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at University of Providence fell 28% between 2021 and 2024 (38.6% → 27.9%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at University of Providence fell 20% between 2021 and 2024 (660 → 528).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at University of Providence rose 14% between 2021 and 2024 ($26.8k → $30.4k).
